/opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/bin/mipsel-none-elf-gcc  -Wall -Wpedantic -DPS1_BUILD -ffreestanding -O3 -DNDEBUG -T/opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/cmake/../ldscripts/exe.ld -nostdlib -Wl,-gc-sections -G8 -static CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/jc_reborn.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/utils.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/uncompress.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/resource.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/dump.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/story.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/walk.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/calcpath.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/ads.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/ttm.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/island.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/bench.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/config.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/graphics_ps1.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/sound_ps1.c.obj CMakeFiles/jcreborn.dir/events_ps1.c.obj -o jcreborn.elf  -lgcc /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/release/libpsxgpu_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/release/libpsxgte_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/release/libpsxspu_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/release/libpsxcd_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/release/libpsxpress_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/release/libpsxsio_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/release/libpsxetc_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/release/libpsxapi_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/release/libsmd_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/release/liblzp_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/release/libc_exe_gprel.a -lgcc
